decision.raw_payload_policy: raw source and extracted payloads remain ignored quarantine
decision.promotion_gate: BND-004 created for 14 selected CC0/public-domain starter assets; additional SRC-010 promotion still requires normalized curated copies, per-pack attribution records, checksum capture, bundle manifest, and asset governance gate verification.

source_summary.policy: No SRC-010 asset is promoted or export eligible until per-pack attribution and license review approves a curated subset.

Isometric Stone Soup by Screaming Brain Studios (CC0) This pack has been converted from the Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup (CC0) tileset collection. Original Source: https://opengameart.org/content/dungeon-crawl-32x32-tiles-supplemental Wall Tiles ========== There are *.tsx tile-sheets for Tiled Map Editor for every tileset, which lets you mix and match tiles as needed. All Block tile-sheets also contain flat "Top Face" tiles which can be used as overlays on top of walls. These are found right beneath

Are you using those assets ? Well, thank you ! Please mind the section below. ! You need to : - Credit the authors mention our social account (Twitter) : Gif (@gif_not_jif) Noiracide (@Noiracide) Romi (@DessRomaric) ✔️ You can : - Use the assets for non-commercial AND commercial project. - Adapt and/or modify the assets to match your project. ❌ You can NOT : - Distribute or sell those assets directly (even modified). - Claim the asset yours. - Use the assets for a NFT/metaverse/IA project. notes: Prefer the CC0/public-domain cohort for the first curated SRC-010 bundle.
Do not include packs with credit, redistribution, NFT/metaverse/AI, or unclear language until attribution and redistribution terms are explicitly resolved.
Treat generated plan records as review guidance only; they are not asset bundle manifests.

suggested_scope: UI baseline: lucifer-rpg-ui and lucifer-equipment after evidence review
Isometric/top-down baseline: isometric stone soup, floors, roads, objects
Space/action baseline: void fleet/main ship/environment/pickups packs
Non-RPG baseline: word/chess/letter-tile packs and CC0 fonts
required_outputs_before_status_ready: docs/asset_intake registry update linking the bundle and attribution records
